headlines.headline: Plevum Partners completes strategic acquisition to strengthen cloud infrastructure

sentiment.reasoning: The strategic acquisition to strengthen cloud infrastructure suggests a positive long-term impact on the company's capabilities and market position.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
